titleStmt.title: SII 16.65: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 65. (A.R. No. 716 of 1926.) KŌKAṬAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Kōṭīśvarasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1440, Bahudhānya, Vaiśākha śu. 15, corresponding to 1518 A.D., April 25, (Sunday).

States that Pedayyaṁgāru, son of Aḷasāni Chokkarājuṅgāru, granted some land in the village Kōkaṭam which was conferred on the donor as uṁbaḷi by the king and which was situated in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma, to the temple of Sakaḷanātha-liṅga at Kōkaṭam on the occasion of a lunar eclipse and in the presence of god Mallikārjuna at Bejavāḍa on the bank of the river Kṛishṇā.

This is followed by a post script which states that Mummaḍrāju, son of Kaṭṭa Mumaḍrāju Tippaṇa, the sthala-karaṇam of the village Kōkaṭam, reconsecrated the temple of god Sakalēśvara-dēva in the year Bahudhānya. Also records a grant of two tūmus of land by Bayirōju of Saṁmaṭūru, son of Agasāla Mallōju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Above the text between the figures of the liṅga and a devotee iskaṭṭa muṁmana in two lines.
div.p:
śubhamastu . śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1440
Agunēṁṭi bahudhānyasaṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇadēvarāya mahārā
yaru pṛthivirājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu Aḷasāni cokkarājuṁgāri ku
māruṁḍu pedayyaṁgāru kōkaṭaṁ sakaḷnāṁthaliṁgānaku yiccina
dānadharmaśāsanamu śrīkṛṣṇadēvarāyamahārāyaru mā
kunu ghaṁḍikōṭa sīmalōnu vuṁbaḷiki pāliṁcca navadhariṁccina kō
kaṭaṁgrāmaṁmaṁdunu sakaḷēśvaradēvuni nai vēdyānakuṁnu dīpārā
dhanakuṁnu muṁmmaḍrājukuṁṭaku dakṣiṇaṁ kāṁcimiṭṭasta
ḷānaku nairutimūlanu vāṁguku vuttarāna kha 1 . nnu Ā dakṣi
ṇaṁ pākaṁvāri kuṁṭaku vuttaraṁ kha 1 nnu vubhayaṁ cēnu kha 2 kini
nai vēdyānaku samarpiṁcina cēnu kha 1 dēvuni saṁnidhini naṁdādīpā
lu 2 kiṁni samarpiṁcina cēnu kha 1 vubhayaṁ cēnu kha 2 yī yi
ruvuṭṭi cēnuṁnu sarvamānyaṁgānu kṛṣṇātīramaṁdunu bejavā
ḍa mallikārjunadēvuni saṁnnidhini sōmagrahaṇapuṁṇyakālama
ṁddunu sahiraṁṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakaṁgānu dhāravō
si yistimi Ācaṁdrārkastāyigānu Anubhaviṁcēdi . yī dha
rmānaku yavvaru raṁḍu talaṁcinānu tama tallidaṁḍṟlānu gō
brāṁhmālānu gaṁgakaratanu vadhiṁccina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahā
rēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi vriṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] vrā
lu śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrī
śrīmanmahādēvuni nagaru kōkaṭaṁ staḷakaraṇaṁ kaṭṭa muṁmaṁ(ma)ḍrāju tippa
na koḍuku muṁmaṁ(ma)ḍrāju kōkaṭaṁ sakaḷēśvaradēvuni nagaru yī
bahudhānya saṁvatsarānanu punaḥ pratiṣṭha śrīkāraṁmūlāna
nu sēyiṁcenu . Anityāni śārīrāni(ṇi) vibhavō naiva śāśvataṁ . nityaṁ saṁni
hitō mṛtyuḥ karttavyaṁ dharmmasaṁgrahaṁ .
yī śāsanamu malicina saṁmmaṭūri Agasāla mallōjukoḍuku bayi
caṁdrārkastāyigānu beṭṭina mānyaṁ cēnu Iddumu .
Digital edition of SII 16.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
